g.text: Palo Alto Network Client - Interactive Setup
This will guide you through creating your .env file.
Have the AI Red Teaming portal open to Channel Setup.
Find the username and password in the 'kubectl create secret' command.
Create a service account in the portal and copy the Client ID and Secret.
The Tenant Path can be extracted from the helm install command in Step 4.
You can paste the FULL OCI URL or just the tenant path.
OCI URL or Tenant Path: my-tenant-org/red-teaming-onprem
OCI URL or Tenant Path: my-tenant-org/red-teaming-onprem
Palo Alto Network Client - Docker Installer
--- Step 3: Extracting chart to discover image and config ---
